Partner

Partner with The Healthy Project Podcast

Reach an audience that cares about health equity, prevention, public health, and community impact.

Request Partnership Info

The Healthy Project Podcast connects with public health professionals, healthcare leaders, community advocates, nonprofits, educators, students, and people working to improve health outcomes.

Partnership opportunities are designed for organizations that want to support meaningful conversations and reach an audience that values trust, community, and action.

Ways to partner

Five ways we work with partners.

Episode Sponsorship

Sponsor a specific episode aligned with your mission or focus area.

Series Sponsorship

Support a themed series around topics like health equity, mental health, chronic disease, prevention, or community health.

Newsletter Sponsorship

Reach the Healthy Project audience through email features and episode highlights.

Sponsored Conversation

Collaborate on a mission-aligned conversation that educates and informs the audience.

Speaking & Live Events

Bring Corey in to host, moderate, speak, or record live conversations.

Who you'll reach

An engaged community across public health and community impact.

The Healthy Project audience includes:

  • Public health professionals
  • Healthcare leaders
  • Community-based organizations
  • Nonprofit leaders
  • Health equity advocates
  • Students and early-career professionals
  • Wellness and prevention professionals
  • People interested in community health and social impact
Get in touch

Submit a partnership inquiry

Tell us a little about your organization and what you're hoping to do together. We'll be in touch.

The Healthy Project Podcast

A documentary-style audio archive of how communities confront structural health inequities.

Hosted by Corey Dion Lewis
